hypothesis: If a conditional variational autoencoder trained on Li–Si–X crystal graphs and conditioned on Si and Li presence, target capacity >1500 mAh/g, and large stable Li-channel radius is used, then it will generate novel silicon-based anode materials that, after CHGNet relaxation, exhibit computed gravimetric capacities above 1500 mAh/g and retain large Li+ migration channel radii between charged and discharged states.
